tooltip.a_halo.a_halos2: §a[Chastity] §2Cannot sleep when a creature is nearby
tooltip.a_halo.a_halos4: §a[Charity] §2You can only deal damage once per second
tooltip.a_halo.a_halos7: §a[Gentleness] §2Speed on land and in water never exceeds 3x
tooltip.a_halo.a_halos8: §a[Diligence] §2Final mining time never drops below 20 game ticks
tooltip.a_halo.a_halod1: §eThe primordial god, imposing limits upon itself
message.a_halo.cannot_sleep_others_watch: §dSomeone's watching... how can I sleep like this!
message.a_halo.cant_eat: §dSo full, meow. Can't eat anymore, meow.
tooltip.a_halo.weight_attachments3: §2I tried to cap it at 0.3 and 3.0
tooltip.a_halo.weight_attachments5: §2Final mining time never drops below 20 game ticks
tooltip.a_halo.weight_attachments6: §2Has no effect on blocks with hardness 0.
tooltip.a_halo.weight_attachmentsd3: §eTo prevent the player from moving too fast
